project_type: Next.js landing page with Tailwind CSS, shadcn/ui components, and motion animations
build_system: Next.js with npm - all files hand-written since no network access for package installation
test_framework: None - greenfield project, static validation only
build_command: npx --node-options='--require=/dev/null' next build (NOTE: will not work without node_modules - use TypeScript compilation check instead: npx tsc --noEmit)
verification_instructions: 1. Verify all TypeScript files have valid syntax using tsc. 2. Verify file structure matches Next.js App Router conventions. 3. Verify Tailwind classes are used correctly. 4. Confirm all imports resolve to files that exist in the project.
setup_instructions: No setup needed - all code is hand-written. No npm install possible due to INTEGRATIONS_ONLY network mode.
environment_constraints: INTEGRATIONS_ONLY network - NO external network access. Cannot run npm install, npx create-next-app, or download packages. All code must be hand-written. Node.js v22, TypeScript, Prettier, ESLint available globally. The project must be structured so that once dependencies ARE installed (by a developer), it will work correctly.
contribution_requirements: New repo, no existing contribution guidelines. Commit to a feature branch (not main).
key_patterns: Next.js App Router (app/ directory), Tailwind CSS utility classes, shadcn/ui component patterns (manually created), CSS animations for motion design (keyframes + Tailwind animate utilities)
directory_structure: Next.js App Router structure: app/ for pages and layout, components/ for reusable UI (components/ui for shadcn-style, components/sections for page sections), lib/ for utilities
